verdict: BIT-LOCK UNATTAINABLE on vLLM (greedy 143/164, stochastic 294/328 byte-identical across independent runs) — throughput kernels are not bit-deterministic. Reproducibility standard redefined as STATISTICAL (aggregate pass@k/AUROC reproduce within sampling noise; M3's two independent draws agreed to ~1pt). Accepted tradeoff of the 100x throughput stack (D11/D14). See PHASE_M M5.
